Off Calendar Sep-14-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF 1840 WASHINGTON ASSOCIATES LLC's Motion For Protective Order is granted in part. Defendant is ordered to return all copies of and not to disseminate any information obtained from documents in the 1840 Washington UCB Construction Loan file and the Washington Case Requirements file containing presonal financial information of the individual investors in Plaintiff. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge : Peter J. Busch, NOT REPORTED. = (301/PJB)
